storagespace_offer.note: Requires customer financial approval before Order Storage

conclusion: No off-site SSH destination credential exists in CCP or vault. Only optional Netcup Storagespace (NFS) can be ordered. Campaign remains blocked_credential until destination is provisioned.
unblock_paths: A: Order Netcup Storagespace + adapt backup script for NFS (or mount NFS and point BACKUP_* at it)
B: Provide external SSH off-site (Hetzner Storage Box or other) as BACKUP_STORAGE_BOX_SSH
C: Contract separate Storage Server product in Netcup and use SSH/NFS
